author: Sarah M.
title: Perfect summer dress
body: The linen quality is excellent and the wrap style is very flattering. Runs true to size.

author: Emma K.
title: Exactly as described
body: Love this dress. The natural white color is clean and elegant. Shipping was super fast.

author: Priya S.
title: Beautiful but wrinkles easily
body: The dress is gorgeous and the linen is authentic. Wrinkles quickly but that's linen nature.
